users: Description: Stores all user information including personal details, contact methods, verification statuses, security settings, KYC details, referral info, device info, and account limits. Represents a complete record of a user in the system.
(users) _id (ObjectId): Unique identifier for the user record.
(users) name (String, default=null): Full name of the user.
(users) userName (String): Username chosen by the user.
(users) email (String, required): User's primary email address, stored in lowercase and trimmed.
(users) cleanedEmail (String, required): Normalized email used for uniqueness or verification.
(users) mobile (String, default=null): User's mobile number.
(users) countryCode (String, default=null): Country code of the mobile number.
(users) whatsappCountryCode (String, default=null): Country code for WhatsApp number.
(users) whatsAppNumber (String, default=null): WhatsApp contact number.
(users) telegramNumber (String, default=null): Telegram contact number.
(users) CountryOfResidence (String, required, default=null): User's country of residence.
(users) password (String, required): Hashed password for account authentication.
(users) googleAuthKey (String, default=null): Secret key for Google Authenticator 2FA.
(users) otp (Number, default=null): One-time password for verification purposes.
(users) mobileOtp (String, default=null): OTP sent via mobile.
(users) whatsAppOtp (String, default=null): OTP sent via WhatsApp.
(users) telegramOtp (String, default=null): OTP sent via Telegram.
(users) googleAuthOtp (Number, default=null): OTP generated via Google Authenticator.
(users) socialType (Number, enum=[1,2], default=null): Type of social login used (1=Google, 2=Apple).
(users) socialId (String, default=null): Identifier from social login.
(users) defaultLang (String, enum=['en','tr','pt',’ru’,’zh’], default='en'): Default language for the user.
(users) defaultCurrency (String, default='usd'): Default currency for the user account.
(users) isVerifySignupToken (String, default=null): Token used for signup verification.
(users) encyptionWordKey (String, default=null): Key for encrypting sensitive user data.
(users) hasEncyptionWordKey (Number, default=0): Flag indicating whether an encryption key exists.
(users) isBackup (Number, default=null): Indicates if the user's data is backed up.
(users) isVerifyLoginToken (String, default=null): Token used to verify login actions.
(users) currentLoginToken (String): Current active login token.
(users) isVerifyLogin (Number): Flag for login verification.
(users) profile (String, default=null): URL or path to user's profile image.
(users) isBiometricEnable (Number, default=0): Flag indicating if biometric login is enabled.
(users) is2faEnable (Number, default=2): Flag indicating if 2FA is enabled.
(users) isEmailEnable (Number, default=1): Flag indicating if email notifications are enabled.
(users) isCloudBackupEnable (Number, default=0): Flag for cloud backup status.
(users) isPushNotificationEnable (Number, default=1): Flag for push notification subscription.
(users) isEmailVerify (Boolean, default=false): Indicates whether email is verified.
(users) isPhoneVerify (Number, default=0): Indicates whether phone number is verified.
(users) isTelegramVerify (Number, default=0): Indicates whether Telegram is verified.
(users) isWhatsAppVerify (Number, default=0): Indicates whether WhatsApp is verified.
(users) isAuthMailVerify (Boolean, default=false): Flag for authentication email verification.
(users) device (Number, enum=deviceType): Device type used by the user.
(users) deviceToken (String): Device-specific push notification token.
(users) appVersion (String): Current version of the app used by the user.
(users) apiKey (String): API key for programmatic access.
(users) secret (String, default=null): Secret for API access.
(users) status (Number, default=1): Account status (0=Deactivated, 1=Active by admin).
(users) deletedAt (Date, default=null): Timestamp when the account was deleted.
(users) pushToken (String, default=null): Token used for push notifications.
(users) googleAuthSecret (String, default=null): Secret for Google Authenticator 2FA.
(users) isKyc (Number, default=0): Flag indicating KYC completion status.
(users) kycRejectReason (String, default=null): Reason for KYC rejection if any.
(users) isKycExpire (Boolean, default=false): Indicates if KYC has expired.
(users) vaultAccountAssetId (String, default=null): ID of the user's vault account asset.
(users) isBlock (Number, default=0): Account block status (0=Unblock, 1=Blocked by admin).
(users) blockBy (Number): Indicates who blocked the account (0=User, 1=Admin).
(users) blockActionUserId (ObjectId): References the 'users' collection for the blocking user.
(users) isAppBlock (Number, default=0): App-level block status (0=Not yet, 1=Active, 2=Blocked).
(users) kycApplicantId (String, default=null): KYC applicant ID.
(users) externalUserId (String, default=null): External system user ID.
(users) kycStatus (Number, default=0): Current KYC status.
(users) hyperCardLimit (Number): Hyper card transaction limit for the user.
(users) cardTypeLimit (Number): Limit associated with card type.
(users) publicKey (String, required): Public key for cryptographic operations.
(users) privateKey (String, required): Private key for cryptographic operations.
(users) sentMobileOtpTime (Date, default=null): Timestamp when mobile OTP was last sent.
(users) isAutoLessFees (Number, default=1): Flag for automatic reduced fees.
(users) kycInfo (Object): Detailed KYC information for the user.
(users) kycReviewResult (Object): Result of KYC review.
(users) cardTopupFee (Number): Fee associated with card top-up.
(users) myReferCode (String): User's referral code.
(users) useReferCode (String): Referral code used by the user.
(users) referredBy (ObjectId): References the 'users' collection for the user who referred this user.
(users) referCommission (Array): Commission earned from referrals.
(users) reminingAffliateReferLimit (Number): Remaining affiliate referral limit.
(users) reminingReferLimit (Number): Remaining referral limit.
(users) referAffiliateLinkCommission (Array): Commission earned via affiliate links.
(users) isReferCommissionUpdate (Boolean, default=false): Indicates if referral commission was updated.
(users) referWalletBalance (Number, default=0): Wallet balance from referrals.
(users) hyperKycInfo (Object): Detailed hyper KYC information.
(users) isManuallyHyperCardLimit (Number, default=0): Flag indicating if hyper card limit was manually set.
(users) cardHolderId (String): Card holder ID for payments.
(users) wasabiCardHolderId (String): Wasabi card holder ID.
(users) cardHolderRejectReason (String): Reason for card holder rejection if any.
(users) registeredIpAddress (String): IP address used during registration.
(users) registerReferAmount (Number): Referral bonus amount for registration.
(users) isRegisterReferChange (Number, default=0): Flag indicating change in registration referral.
(users) appVersions (Array): Stores user app version history with device info and timestamps.
(users) passwordChangeCount (Number, default=0): Counter for password changes.
(users) createdAt (Date, auto-generated): Timestamp of when the user document was created.
(users) updatedAt (Date, auto-generated): Timestamp of when the user document was last updated.
Relationships: **NOTE: This relationship is only for the your semantic understanding for correct query generation not part of the MongoDB schema itself.**
Any table's userId corresponds to users._id
